{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211433462B2CB0A9B1C068ECDFF8"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573589991522730777","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是一群富二代官二代道二代破案捉鬼的故事，挺有意思","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":3,"text":"富二代","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AF%8C%E4%BA%8C%E4%BB%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407482668ECDFF8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227573589991522730777%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227527727802854951961%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AF%8C%E4%BA%8C%E4%BB%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763368053,"group_id":"7527727802854951961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一念心清净，莲花处处开","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+VaFcFGr7VW/JYJf2Q4yW0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/629486df81a94f5290cb32e88b50ee7a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619749&x-signature=BvpAzLzekmIT85Z%2FzkCTkpRa%2BiA%3D","user_id":"5420909483","user_name":"守护结弦宝贝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5420909483","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7527727802854951961","book_info":{"abstract":"假道士和被开除警队的双男主悬疑探案小说，以胡说八道的案子为主，掺杂说不清道明，只有玄学才能解释情节
不要相信鬼会为自己伸冤，也不要相信有人真的能看见鬼，虽然本文所有的案子都和这个非二维世界的生物相关
不要指望本文全程探案，毕竟偶尔也会撒点小糖霜，至于糖霜下面是蛋糕？是玻璃渣？还是苦瓜？不妨自己品评
——————————————————————————————————-
双男主群像探案文，探案过程轻快中掺杂着一丝丝沉重，保证阅文过程欢快，如有不悦，可随时恶评弃文！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1bc2c450700882dd1412aa1f0466931c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"干饭不能停","author_id":"","book_id":"7527727802854951961","book_name":"鬼案实录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":747,"name":"女频悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=747&name=女频悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1169,"name":"悬疑恋爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1169&name=悬疑恋爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7527728049744249369","read_count":"21","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"228398"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"111","tags":"女频悬疑,悬疑,推理,破案,群像,悬疑恋爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1bc2c450700882dd1412aa1f0466931c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258826&x-signature=SLJ6T0pHyxn%2FeEiGgm4ty3fj%2FYs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1561727218752030","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"93"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211433462B2CB0A9B1C068ECDFF8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat"
